prompt: Persist RM_IM and incrementally update Direct RIB
note: RM_IM_InterfaceTable now persists in state under rm.im.interfaces, reconciles IFNET snapshots into changed/deleted sets, and updates Direct RIB entries only for affected interfaces while preserving unchanged route objects and ages. Static dependency resolution remains safe and full. 305 tests pass.
decisions: Make control-plane refresh the sole production writer of persistent RM_IM state
Keep show commands read-only so they cannot consume reconciliation diffs
Incrementally update Direct routes while globally re-resolving Static routes with recursive dependencies
